description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular tabletop with gently curved edges and ornate carvings along the front apron and legs. The front side displays two drawers, each adorned with decorative handles and subtle floral motifs, adding a touch of elegance. The legs are cabriole-style, curving outward and tapering gracefully toward the floor, with additional carved embellishments near the top. The surface appears smooth and finished in a uniform light gray color, giving it a refined and classic appearance. The drawers are likely functional, providing storage space for small items. The overall design suggests a vintage or French provincial influence, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with two ornate drawers, cabriole legs, and decorative carvings, finished in light gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with decorative handles and carved details on the apron and legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved cabriole leg profile and the smooth, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the elegant curvature of the legs without drawer details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the cabriole leg design and smooth side surface.
attribute_leg_design: curved cabriole legs with carved details
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
